_meta._capture_origin: Claude Code UserPromptSubmit hook contract from public docs; concrete session_id/cwd/transcript_path values and prompt style aligned to the local transcript at ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-yuyu-liao-vicone-SecondSight/3756b281-8769-424f-bb1a-aa3fe1aeecc9.jsonl (observed 2026-05-12).
_meta._privacy_canary_field_rationale: UserPromptSubmit payloads carry permission_mode but the adapter does not store it in data — only prompt_text, transcript_path, and cwd are persisted. Placing the canary here ensures a regression that starts copying permission_mode into data is caught, while keeping the prompt field clean so DT-3 does not conflict with the SD §3.7.4 requirement to store prompt_text completely.

payload.prompt:

1. What does fallback_events.jsonl do?
2. What does curl-errors.log do?
